nasb.text: You shall put the holy garments on Aaron and anoint him and consecrate him, that he may minister as a priest to Me.

esv.text: and put on Aaron the holy garments. And you shall anoint him and consecrate him, that he may serve me as priest.

cnv.text: 要把聖衣給亞倫穿上，又膏抹他，使他成聖，可以作我的祭司。

ccb.text: 给亚伦穿上圣衣后膏立他，使他分别出来，做圣洁的祭司事奉我。
